parameters.content:
## Zoom Sales Call to HubSpot CRM Notes Updater — WayinVideo + GPT-4o-mini + HubSpot API + Sheets

For sales teams, account managers, and agencies who run client calls and want to automatically log structured notes in HubSpot CRM without manually writing notes after every call. Paste any Zoom, Google Meet, or Teams recording URL via the form. WayinVideo transcribes the full call with speaker labels and timestamps. GPT-4o-mini extracts nine structured CRM fields: call summary, pain points identified, objections raised, key quotes, next steps, follow-up date, deal stage recommendation, sentiment, and confidence score. A formatted CRM note is created on the matching HubSpot contact (looked up by email). A follow-up task is also created in HubSpot with the agreed next steps. Everything is logged to Google Sheets with the HubSpot Note ID, Task ID, and Contact ID.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Call Recording + CRM Details** collects the recording URL, contact email, contact name, company name, call purpose, call date, and sales rep name
- **2. WayinVideo — Submit Transcription** submits the URL for speaker-labeled transcription
- **3. Wait — 90 Seconds** gives the API initial processing time
- **4. WayinVideo — Get Transcript Results** polls for the task result
- **5. IF — Transcription Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **7. Code — Format Transcript** formats each segment with speaker label and timestamp
- **8. AI Agent — Extract CRM Note** uses GPT-4o-mini to extract 9 structured fields including deal stage, sentiment, and confidence score
- **10. Code — Parse CRM Output** extracts all 9 sections via regex, builds the full HubSpot note body, and calculates the follow-up timestamp
- **11. HTTP — Search HubSpot Contact** searches HubSpot for the contact by email address
- **12. Code — Extract HubSpot Contact ID** extracts the contact ID and throws an error if the contact is not found
- **13. HTTP — Create HubSpot Note** creates an engagement note associated with the HubSpot contact
- **14. HTTP — Create HubSpot Task** creates a follow-up task associated with the same contact
- **15. Google Sheets — Log CRM Entry** logs all 16 fields including HubSpot Note ID, Task ID, deal stage, sentiment, and confidence score

## Set up steps
1. In **2. WayinVideo — Submit Transcription** and **4. WayinVideo — Get Transcript Results** — replace YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **11. HTTP — Search HubSpot Contact**, **13. HTTP — Create HubSpot Note**, and **14. HTTP — Create HubSpot Task** — replace YOUR_HUBSPOT_PRIVATE_APP_TOKEN (create in HubSpot Settings → Integrations → Private Apps, required scopes: crm.objects.contacts.write, crm.objects.notes.write, crm.objects.tasks.write)
4. In **15. Google Sheets — Log CRM Entry** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID
5. Create a Google Sheet tab named CRM Call Log with columns: Contact Email, Contact Name, Company, Call Purpose, Call Date, Sales Rep, Call Duration (min), HubSpot Contact ID, HubSpot Note ID, HubSpot Task ID, Deal Stage, Sentiment, Confidence Score, Follow-up Date, Recording URL, Created On

## Form Input
Sales rep submits recording URL, contact email, contact name, company name, call purpose, call date, and sales rep name. All seven fields feed into the transcript formatter and AI CRM extraction prompt.

## WayinVideo Transcription Submit and Poll
Submits the call recording URL for speaker-labeled transcription. Waits 90 seconds for initial processing. Polls the results endpoint until status equals SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Transcription Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to transcript formatting. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until the transcript is ready.

nodes.name: Section — Transcript Formatting and AI CRM Extraction

parameters.content:
## Transcript Formatting and AI CRM Extraction
Formats transcript with speaker labels and timestamps. GPT-4o-mini extracts 9 CRM fields: call summary, pain points, objections, key quotes, next steps, follow-up date, deal stage recommendation, sentiment, and confidence score.

nodes.name: Section — HubSpot Contact Lookup, Note and Task Creation, and Sheet Log

parameters.content:
## HubSpot Contact Lookup, Note and Task Creation, and Sheet Log
Searches HubSpot for the contact by email. Extracts the contact ID — throws if not found. Creates an engagement note on the contact. Creates a follow-up task. Logs all 16 fields to Google Sheets including HubSpot Note ID and Task ID.

parameters.formTitle: Sales Call to HubSpot CRM Note Logger

values.placeholder: https://zoom.us/rec/xxxxxxx or Google Meet / Loom link
e.g. Discovery Call, Demo, Follow-up, Negotiation, Closing

parameters.formDescription: Paste your sales call recording URL. AI will transcribe the full call, extract key CRM insights, and automatically log a structured note to HubSpot.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert sales analyst who extracts structured CRM data from sales call transcripts.

Your job is to read this sales call transcript and extract everything a sales rep needs to log in their CRM — in a clean, structured format ready to paste into HubSpot.

---

## CALL DETAILS
- Contact Name: {{ $json.contactName }}
- Company: {{ $json.companyName }}
- Call Purpose: {{ $json.callPurpose }}
- Call Date: {{ $json.callDate }}
- Sales Rep: {{ $json.salesRep }}
- Call Duration: {{ $json.totalMinutes }} minutes
- Speakers Detected: {{ $json.speakers }}

---

## EXTRACTION RULES
1. Extract ONLY from what was actually discussed in the call — no invented content
2. Be specific and factual — avoid vague statements
3. Pain points must be actual problems the prospect mentioned, not assumptions
4. Objections must be actual objections raised — not hypothetical ones
5. Next steps must be specific actions with owners if mentioned
6. Follow-up date should be taken from what was agreed in the call — use TBD if not mentioned
7. Deal stage must be one of: Prospecting / Qualification / Demo Scheduled / Proposal Sent / Negotiation / Closed Won / Closed Lost
8. Sentiment must be one of: Very Positive / Positive / Neutral / Negative / Very Negative

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return your response in this exact structure — use these exact labels:

CALL_SUMMARY:
[Write 3-4 sentences summarizing what was discussed, what the prospect is looking for, and where the conversation ended]

PAIN_POINTS:
- [Pain point 1 — specific problem the prospect mentioned]
- [Pain point 2]
- [Pain point 3 if applicable]
[Write 'None identified' if no pain points were mentioned]

OBJECTIONS_RAISED:
- [Objection 1 — exact concern raised]
- [Objection 2 if applicable]
[Write 'None raised' if no objections]

KEY_QUOTES:
- [Most important thing the prospect said — direct or near-direct quote]
- [Second key quote if available]
[Write 'None captured' if no notable quotes]

NEXT_STEPS:
- [Next step 1 with owner — e.g. 'Sales Rep to send proposal by Friday']
- [Next step 2 with owner]
[Write 'Not discussed' if no next steps agreed]

FOLLOW_UP_DATE:
[Date agreed for next touchpoint — or 'TBD' if not mentioned]

DEAL_STAGE:
[One of: Prospecting / Qualification / Demo Scheduled / Proposal Sent / Negotiation / Closed Won / Closed Lost]

SENTIMENT:
[One of: Very Positive / Positive / Neutral / Negative / Very Negative]

CONFIDENCE_SCORE:
[Rate how likely this deal is to progress — 1 to 10 — based on the conversation tone and signals]

---

Now read the call transcript and extract the CRM note:
